zh.Bentley, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾本特利
zh.Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾華亞頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Newmarch II於大約1166年出生在英國越可爾本特利時，他的父親Henry de Newmarch16歲，母親Dionisia de Tilly17歲。他於從1196年1月8日到1197年1月7日與Margeria de Bosville在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1215年被列為surety。他去世於1247年9月之前在英國諾廷加姆爾華亞頓。

zh-hans.Hatfield, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾哈特菲爾德
zh-hans.Bentley, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾本特利
zh-hans.Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国諾廷加姆爾華亞頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Newmarch II于大约1166年出生在英国越可爾本特利时，他的父亲Henry de Newmarch16岁，母亲Dionisia de Tilly17岁。他于从1196年1月8日到1197年1月7日与Margeria de Bosville在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1215年被列为surety。他去世于1247年9月之前在英国諾廷加姆爾華亞頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Newmarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Neufmarché (Seine-Maritime). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

variants.name: Newmark
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Chayim, Meyer, Shlomo, Vigdor.
Americanized form of Scandinavian Nymark: habitational name from farms named with ny ‘new’ + mark ‘field’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Neumark  .

variants.name: Anglo-Norman Families
meanings: 2  Norman, English: locative name from Martinvast (in Manche, France). See   Anglo-Norman Families  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Newmarch II was born about 1166, in Bentley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Henry de Newmarch, was 16 and his mother, Dionisia de Tilly, was 17. He married Margeria de Bosville from 8 January 1196 to 7 January 1197, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. In 1215, at the age of 50, his occupation is listed as surety. He died before September 1247, in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Newmarch II est né environ 1166, à Bentley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Newmarch, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Dionisia de Tilly, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Margeria de Bosville du 8 janvier 1196 au 7 janvier 1197, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. En 1215, à l’âge de 50 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est surety. Il est décédé avant septembre 1247, à Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Newmarch II um 1166 in Bentley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Newmarch 16 und seine Mutter Dionisia de Tilly 17. Er hat von 8. Januar 1196 bis 7. Januar 1197 in England Margeria de Bosville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. 1215, als er 50 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als surety aufgeführt. Er starb vor September 1247 in Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Newmarch II è nato il circa 1166 nel Bentley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Newmarch, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Dionisia de Tilly, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Margeria de Bosville da 8 gennaio 1196 a 7 gennaio 1197, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Nel 1215, all'età di 50 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come surety. Morì prima del settembre 1247, nel Whatton, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.Womersley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウオメルスリー

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Newmarch IIが約1166年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベントリーで生まれた時，父Henry de Newmarchは16歳，母Dionisia de Tillyは17歳であった。から1196年1月8日まで1197年1月7日にイギリスでMargeria de Bosvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。1215年，50歳の時，職業はsuretyと記録されている。彼は1247年9月以前にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウアットオンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Newmarch II(이)가 대략 1166년 영국 요르크실르 벤틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Newmarch(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionisia de Tilly(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1196년 1월 8일부터 1197년 1월 7일까지 영국에서 Margeria de Bosville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1215년, 50세의 나이로 그의 직업은 surety이었다. 그는 1247년 9월 이전 영국 노틴그함실르 화엇에서 사망했다.

pt.1196: de 8 de janeiro de 1196 a 7 de janeiro de 1197
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Newmarch II nasceu aproximadamente 1166, em Bentley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Newmarch, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Dionisia de Tilly, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Margeria de Bosville de 8 de janeiro de 1196 a 7 de janeiro de 1197, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Em 1215, com 50 anos, sua profissão aparece como surety. Ele faleceu antes setembro de 1247, em Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Newmarch II родился около 1166 г. в местности бентли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Newmarch было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionisia de Tilly, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Margeria de Bosville с 8 января 1196 по 7 января 1197 в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1215 году, в возрасте 50 лет,  он работал по профессии surety. Он умер перед сентябрь 1247 г. в местности уаттон, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.1196: desde 8 de enero de 1196 hasta 7 de enero de 1197
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Newmarch II nació aproximadamente 1166, en Bentley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Newmarch, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Dionisia de Tilly, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Margeria de Bosville desde 8 de enero de 1196 hasta 7 de enero de 1197, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. En 1215, a la edad de 50 años, su ocupación registrada era surety. Murió antes de septiembre de 1247, en Whatton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
